creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Do you still experience this problem with recent versions of FreeBSD, xorg-server, and xf86-video-ati driver?  Note that DRM support had moved out of the base system/kernel to the `graphics/drm-*-kmod' and `graphics/gpu-firmware-kmod' ports.

Your report was against 8.2-RELEASE which went of out support long time ago.  Please update to contemporary, supported FreeBSD version before reconducting your tests.

Adding x11@ to CC list so it can be tracked while originally filed under base system/kern.
